scenarios.name: Avatar video generation, poll, download
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents Bearer auth and incorrect endpoint/payload shapes; treatment uses X-Api-Key, POSTs the documented video_inputs structure with character/voice/dimension to /v2/video/generate, polls /v1/video_status.get?video_id=... for status=='completed', then streams the video_url to disk.

scenarios.name: Video translation with lip-sync
scenarios.rationale: Baseline fabricates a translate endpoint and a generic language field; treatment POSTs to /v2/video_translate with video_url, output_language='es', and title, then polls /v2/video_translate/{translate_id} for completed status — exactly the documented contract.
